name: Home page loads with hero, navigation and all sections
description: Verify the home page loads correctly with the Black Diamond branding, hero section, navigation, services, gallery, location, testimonials and footer.

planSteps.description: Navigate to https://black-diamond-wheat.vercel.app/
Verify the Black Diamond logo and brand name are visible in the navigation bar
Verify the hero section displays the BLACK DIAMOND heading with tagline about excellence
Verify the navigation links (SOBRE MIM, SERVIÇOS, GALERIA, ONDE ESTAMOS, AGENDAR) are visible on desktop
Scroll down slowly through the entire homepage
Verify the WhatsApp floating icon button is visible
Verify the footer displays Black Diamond branding and contact information

name: Navigation links scroll and booking opens
description: Verify navigation links scroll to correct sections on the homepage and booking button opens the booking form.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Click the AGENDAR navigation link
Verify the booking form/page opens with step indicators and available services list
Navigate back to the homepage
Click the SERVIÇOS navigation link
Verify the page scrolls to the services section showing service cards
Click the ONDE ESTAMOS navigation link
Verify the page shows the location section with address information

name: Services section displays services with prices and durations
description: Verify the services section shows the list of barbershop services with names, prices and durations.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Scroll down to the services section
Verify multiple service cards are displayed with service names visible
Verify each service card shows a price in Brazilian Real (R$)
Verify each service card shows the duration in minutes
Click on a service card or its button if available
Verify some interaction or detail occurs for the selected service

name: Gallery displays images with preview
description: Verify the gallery section loads images and clicking opens a preview modal.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Scroll down to the gallery section
Verify gallery images are visible and loaded in a grid layout
Click on a gallery image
Verify an image preview or modal opens showing the full image with navigation controls
Close the preview modal
Verify the gallery section is visible again and the modal is closed

name: Complete booking flow happy path
description: Verify a user can complete a full booking by selecting service, date, time and confirming.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the booking page at /agendar
Click on a service to select it
Click the 'Próximo' or 'Continuar' button to proceed to date selection
Select an available date from the date picker / calendar
Select an available time slot from the available times
Click 'Próximo' or 'Continuar' to go to client data step
Fill in test client name and a valid phone number with DDD
Click the confirm or 'Agendar' button to finalize the booking
Verify a booking confirmation or success message is displayed with the booking details

name: Booking form validates empty and invalid fields
description: Verify the booking form shows validation errors when required fields are empty or invalid.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the booking page at /agendar
Try to click 'Próximo' or 'Continuar' without selecting any service
Verify a validation message or visual indication appears that a service selection is required
Select a service and proceed to the date step
Try to proceed without selecting a date or time
Verify a validation message appears that date and time selection is required
Select a date and time and proceed to client data step
Leave client name and phone empty and try to submit
Verify validation errors appear for missing name or phone fields

name: Admin login with valid credentials redirects to dashboard
description: Verify the admin login page allows authentication with valid credentials.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the admin login page at /admin/login
Verify the login form is visible with email and password fields
Enter the admin email in the email field
Enter the admin password in the password field
Click the 'Entrar' or login button
Verify the page redirects to the admin dashboard showing the sidebar navigation

name: Admin dashboard shows metrics, revenue chart and occupancy
description: Verify the admin dashboard displays key metrics, revenue chart, occupancy rate and recent bookings.

planSteps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to the admin dashboard
Verify the dashboard shows today's date and greeting message
Verify statistics cards are visible showing booking counts
Verify the occupancy rate card is visible showing occupation percentage
Verify the revenue chart section is visible with chart tabs (Diário, Semanal, Comparação)
Click on each chart tab to verify they load
Verify the recent bookings or upcoming bookings list is visible on the dashboard

name: Admin weekly schedule view shows bookings by day
description: Verify the admin weekly schedule page shows bookings organized by day and time.

planSteps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to /admin/weekly
Verify the weekly schedule view loads with days of the week displayed as columns or tabs
Click on different day tabs or navigate between days
Verify bookings are displayed in their respective time slots with client names
Click on a booking card if available
Verify a booking detail panel opens showing booking information (client, services, status)

name: Admin clients management with search and export
description: Verify the admin can view, search clients and use export functionality.

planSteps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to /admin/clientes
Verify the clients list loads with client names and phone numbers
Type a search term in the search bar
Verify the list filters to show only matching clients
Clear the search field
Verify the full client list is restored
Click on an export button if available
Verify export options dropdown appears with options to export bookings, clients and financial data

name: Admin settings - services management
description: Verify the admin can view and manage services in settings.

planSteps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to the settings/profile page
Click on the Serviços tab or section in settings
Verify the services list is displayed with name, price and duration for each service
Click to add a new service or edit an existing one
Verify a form appears with fields for service name, price and duration

name: Admin settings - horários e schedule configuration
description: Verify the admin can view business hours and schedule configuration.

planSteps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to the settings/profile page
Click on the Horários tab or section in settings
Verify the business hours configuration is displayed with days of the week
Verify each day shows opening time, closing time and lunch break configuration
Toggle a day to open/closed state
Verify the visual state changes to reflect open or closed status

name: Admin notifications page and push notification settings
description: Verify the notifications page loads and shows notification history.

planSteps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to /admin/notificacoes
Verify the notifications page loads with a list of past notifications
Verify each notification shows title, message and timestamp
Click on a notification if any are present
Verify the notification can be marked as read

name: Cancel and manage booking pages work
description: Verify the cancel and manage booking pages allow phone lookup.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /cancelar
Verify the cancel booking page loads with a phone input field
Enter a test phone number in the input field
Click the search or 'Buscar' button
Verify matching bookings are displayed with booking details or a not-found message appears

name: Admin settings - new features (cupons, fidelidade, faltas)
description: Verify the new admin settings features for coupons, loyalty and no-show control are accessible.

planSteps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to the settings/profile page
Scroll or navigate to the Cupons e Promoções section
Verify the coupons management section is visible with option to create new coupons
Navigate to the Fidelidade section
Verify the loyalty program section is visible with toggle and configuration options for visit threshold
Navigate to the Controle de Faltas section
Verify the no-show control section is visible with slider to configure max no-shows

name: 404 page and footer work correctly
description: Verify the 404 page displays for invalid routes and footer has correct info.

planSteps.description: Navigate to a non-existent route like /this-page-does-not-exist
Verify a 404 or 'Página não encontrada' page is displayed with a message and link back to home
Click the link to return to the homepage
Verify navigation to the homepage was successful
